titleStmt.title: SII 22.400: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 400. (A.R. No. 400 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. SATYAGIRINĀTHA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SĒNAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE

summary.p: This is dated in Śaka 1383, Vishu, Uttarāyaṇa, Kumbha, śu. 6, Friday, Aśvati corresponding to A.D. 1462, February 5. This registers an endowment of the village Rāhuttamiṇḍaṉ-vayal alias Sundara-Pāṇḍyanallūr near Iḷañjar village with all its lands wet and dry, and other appurtenances, for the requirements of worship and offerings to god Tirumeyya-Malaiyāḷar, at Tirumeyyam in Kānanāḍu alias Vīrudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, during a service instituted in his name in the temple, by the chief Avaiyāṇḍār alias Sundara-Pāṇḍya-Vijayālayadēvar of Suraikkuḍi near Niyamam in Adaḷaiyūr-nāḍu, a division of Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī [.]śakāptam 1000 3 100 8 10 3- ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa
viṣu varuṣattu Uttarāyaṉattu kumparavi pūrva pakṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum
śukravāramum peṟṟa Aśvati nāḷ keraḷa ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu Ataḷaiyūr nā
ṭṭu niyamappaṟṟu curaikkuṭi Avaiyāṇṭārāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya vicaiyā
laiyatevareṉ kāṉaṉāṭāṉa virutarāca payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu kāṉaṉā
ṭṭu daivasthānam brammateśam tirumeyyattu nayiṉār tirumeyyama
laiyāḷaṟku nammuṭaiya nāḷile nammuṭaiya perāle cuntarapāṇ
ṭiya vicaiyālaiyaṉ cantiyāka Iṉṉamutu veḷḷam Eḻuntaruḷiṉā
ppole Amutu ceytaruḷum taḷikai Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭi neyyamu
tu kaṟi Amutu Uppamutu miḷakamutu Ilai Amutu Aṭaikkāyamutu cāttuppaṭi
tirumālai tirupparivaṭṭam Uḷḷiṭṭa pala veñcaṉātikaḷukkum Iṉṉāṭṭup
pakaippaṟṟu Iḷañcārp puravil Irākuttamiṇṭaṉ vayalāṉa cuntara
pāṇṭiya nallūr nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nañcey puñ
ceyum nattamum nattatapparappuṅ kuḷamuṅ kuḷapparappu maṟṟum Eppe
yaṟpaṭṭa camuttap piṟāttikaḷum Iṉṉayiṉārkku tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa
māka cantiṟātittavar cella caṟuva māṉiyamāka naṭakkumpaṭi kaṟpit
tu viṭṭa Aḷavukku Immariyātiyile Iḷañcār puravil Irāku
tta miṇṭaṉ vayalāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyanallūr nāṉkel
laikkuṭppaṭṭa nilattil tiruviṭaiāṭṭam tevatāṉam manitta
riṟaiyili niṅkalākavum Inta nilaṅkaḷil paccaiyum Iruñciṟai
peruntuṟaikku Aṟṟa mariyāti Iṉṉāyiṉāṟku viṭṭa Aḷavukku
inta vayal candrātittavat cella tiruviṭaiāṭṭam Ākak ka
lliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷakkaṭavatā
kavum Intat tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukku Ahitam paṇṇi
ṉavaṉ gaṅkek karaiyile pacuvaiyum brāhmaṇa
raiyuṅ guru vaiyuṅ koṉṟa pāpam peṟa
kkaṭavaṉākavum Ippaṭikku Avaiyāṇṭārāṉa
cuntarapāṇṭiya vicaiyālaiya tevar EḻuttuThis last line is wanting in the inscription.
Digital edition of SII 22.400 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
